dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Ten years. Ten years since I was picked up from that crashed plane.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Ten years since I started living a 'normal' life.

dialogue.speaker: Ijin Yu
dialogue.line: The smell of chalk dust, the murmur of students, the distant sound of a bell... it's all still so foreign.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: RUSTLE

dialogue.speaker: Ijin Yu
dialogue.line: Even after all this time, the instincts remain. The urge to scan my surroundings, identify threats, plan escape routes.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CLICK (of a pen)

dialogue.speaker: Ijin Yu
dialogue.line: But here, in this classroom, the only 'threat' is a pop quiz.

dialogue.speaker: Yu Dayun
dialogue.line: Oppa! There you are!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: THUMP THUMP (running footsteps)

dialogue.speaker: Ijin Yu
dialogue.line: Dayun.

dialogue.speaker: Yu Dayun
dialogue.line: I've been looking for you everywhere! Are you ready to go home? Grandpa made your favorite!

dialogue.speaker: Ijin Yu
dialogue.line: Yeah. Let's go.

dialogue.speaker: Ijin Yu
dialogue.line: Her smile... it's a constant reminder of what I'm protecting. What I'm living for now.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: As they walked through the school gates, a group of older students loitered by a convenience store, their eyes scanning the younger kids.

dialogue.speaker: Bully 1
dialogue.line: Hey, look what we have here. Little Miss Perfect, Yu Dayun.

dialogue.speaker: Yu Dayun
dialogue.line: Oh no...

dialogue.speaker: Bully 2
dialogue.line: Heard you got the top score on the English test again. Must be nice, having everything handed to you.

dialogue.speaker: Bully 1
dialogue.line: How about you 'share' some of that good fortune with us? Like, your lunch money?

dialogue.speaker: Ijin Yu
dialogue.line: Leave her alone.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CRUNCH (gravel underfoot)

dialogue.speaker: Bully 1
dialogue.line: Oh? And who's this scrawny guy? Her bodyguard?

dialogue.speaker: Bully 2
dialogue.line: He looks like he'd snap in half if I breathed on him.

dialogue.speaker: Ijin Yu
dialogue.line: I said, leave her alone.

dialogue.speaker: Ijin Yu
dialogue.line: My body tensed, ready. My eyes tracked their movements, their tells. The slight shift in weight, the clenching of a fist.

dialogue.speaker: Ijin Yu
dialogue.line: It would be so easy to disarm them. To incapacitate them before they even realized what was happening.

dialogue.speaker: Bully 1
dialogue.line: Or what, kid? You gonna cry to your mommy?

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SWISH (Bully 1's arm swings)

dialogue.speaker: Ijin Yu
dialogue.line: I sidestepped, a blur. My hand shot out, not to strike, but to intercept.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: GRIP! (Ijin catches Bully 1's wrist)

dialogue.speaker: Bully 1
dialogue.line: Agh! What the—?! Let go!

dialogue.speaker: Ijin Yu
dialogue.line: My grip was firm, precise. Just enough pressure on a nerve point to cause discomfort, not injury. A warning.

dialogue.speaker: Bully 2
dialogue.line: Hey, what are you doing to him?!

dialogue.speaker: Ijin Yu
dialogue.line: My gaze met Bully 2's. Cold. Unflinching. The kind of look that had stopped men twice their age in their tracks.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: GULP

dialogue.speaker: Bully 1
dialogue.line: Okay, okay! I get it! Just let go!

dialogue.speaker: Ijin Yu
dialogue.line: I released him. He stumbled back, rubbing his wrist, a new fear in his eyes.

dialogue.speaker: Bully 2
dialogue.line: Let's go! This guy's weird!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SCRAMBLE (bullies running away)

dialogue.speaker: Yu Dayun
dialogue.line: Oppa! Wow! You were so cool!

dialogue.speaker: Ijin Yu
dialogue.line: It's nothing. Let's go home.

dialogue.speaker: Ijin Yu
dialogue.line: I still have to be careful. Can't let my past bleed into their lives too much. Not yet.

dialogue.speaker: Yu Jin-ho (Grandpa)
dialogue.line: Ah, there are my favorite grandchildren! Dinner's ready!

dialogue.speaker: Ijin Yu
dialogue.line: The warmth of their home, the scent of Grandpa's cooking... it's a different kind of battlefield. One I'm still learning to navigate.

dialogue.speaker: Ijin Yu
dialogue.line: But I'll protect it. With everything I have.

summary: Ijin Yu, a former child mercenary, navigates the unfamiliar world of high school and family life. When his younger sister Dayun is confronted by bullies, Ijin subtly intervenes, hinting at his hidden skills while trying to maintain his 'normal' facade and protect his new family.
